Selected work

FIVE OF THEM

Mobile · React Native

WizardsTome

Launching · Google Play

A multi-format reader that makes messy documents beautiful. It opens EPUB, comics, PDF, text, and image archives — then rebuilds clean paragraphs from hard-wrapped, hyphenated source and typesets it with real themes, text-to-speech, and reading-position resume.

  • React Native
  • TypeScript
  • Expo
  • pdf.js

Mobile Game · Custom Engine

Immortal Journey

Launching · Google Play

A top-down action-survivor with a cultivation theme: 100 escalating waves, 10 mechanically-distinct boss fights, ability loadouts, and realm progression — all rendered on a hand-written OpenGL sprite engine and fixed-step game loop.

  • React Native
  • expo-gl · OpenGL
  • Game loop

PC Game · Systems

Ascendant Sect

In development · Steam

A city-builder at Songs of Syx scale. Command thousands of workers and a hundred individually-tracked elites — built in C++ with a deterministic simulation, A* pathfinding, a resource economy, and a RimWorld-style threat director.

  • C++17
  • raylib
  • ECS · Sim
  • Pathfinding

AI Platform · Fintech

TradePro & Trader News

Working build · code private

An AI-powered trading platform: a FastAPI web app plus a separate ML prediction microservice (XGBoost / Random-Forest ensembles over technical indicators), a companion market-analysis app with Google-Gemini summaries and two-factor auth, and live broker-integrated bots. Cloud-deployed; code kept private.

  • Python
  • FastAPI
  • ML · XGBoost
  • Gemini
  • Docker

Simulation · C# · Systems + ML

Economy Sim

In development · research

A ~28,000-line agent-based simulation of an entire economy — thousands of families producing, trading, and dying across millennia. I ran 5,000-year simulations, diagnosed emergent wealth-condensation against real econophysics models, and am adding neuroevolution so agents learn their own strategies.

  • C#
  • Agent-based sim
  • Chart.js · D3
  • Neuroevolution

Let's build something.

Biology undergrad who'd rather ship. I pair hands-on building with clear communication — happy to demo any of this live and talk through what it does and why. If you need someone who turns ideas into working products fast, let's talk.
